title: Kernera antarctica
taxonomy: Kernera antarctica is classified as a member of the family Brassicaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Kernera. Kernera antarctica is a flowering plant, and its classification is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae. It is a species of flowering plant that is native to sub-Antarctic islands. Kernera antarctica is also known as Antarctic rock cabbage or Antarctic wintercress.

intro: Kernera antarctica, also known as Antarctic hair grass, is a perennial plant species that is native to the Antarctic region. The plant has been found to exhibit potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The bioactive constituents of Kernera antarctica include sesquiterpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
